title: AI is KILLING your SaaS! Here's WHY. #shorts
summary: AI agents are rapidly advancing and posing competitive threats to SaaS businesses. The video discusses how organizations can adapt to remain viable in a landscape increasingly shaped by sophisticated AI models.
writeup: This short argues that fast-improving AI agents are becoming direct competitive threats to SaaS businesses. It frames the shift as a landscape increasingly shaped by sophisticated AI models, where established software products risk displacement. The takeaway: organizations need to adapt their offerings to stay viable as agents take on work that SaaS tools previously owned.
